text:
Created attachment 234879
Patch to resolve this issue

Without patch:
root@share-bare13:~ # ifconfig hn0 media autoselect
ifconfig: SIOCSIFMEDIA (media): Operation not supported
root@share-bare13:~ # 

With patch:
root@share-bare13:~ # ifconfig hn0 media autoselect
root@share-bare13:~ #
